understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to move pushable blocks or selectables onto the goal tiles, marked by + in the semantic grid, by controlling one selectable piece at a time and using the available limited steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurred in 3-pixel increments (one cell per move), and a selectable piece could push adjacent pushable blocks if possible. Walls could block certain movements, and their behaviors varied based on their type and position. Switching between multiple selectable pieces required using the CLICK action with the correct grid/pixel coordinates as shown in the state data.
